Title: Renvia Circulation Booster
Body (HTML):
Drug-free EMS therapy for tired, heavy, swollen legs and feet. Rest your feet on the footplate, choose from 99 intensity levels on the wireless remote, and let it gently work your lower-leg muscles for 20 minutes. Body pads included for knees, lower back and shoulders.

  • EMS + TENS electrical stimulation
  • 99 intensity levels, 25 modes
  • Wireless remote, large buttons
  • Rechargeable (USB-C), 20-minute auto-timer
  • Body pads included
  • 90-day money-back guarantee

Wellness device for temporary relief of tired, aching legs and feet. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Title: Renvia Gel-Pad Refills
Body (HTML): Replacement self-adhesive gel pads for your Renvia Circulation Booster body-pad attachment. Each pad lasts approximately 20–30 uses. Subscribe & save to never run out. A 3-month supply.
